story.title: COVID-19 Oral History with David Pate B
story.description: The interview centers on pandemic preparedness, historical learning, and the challenges of misinformation in modern society. The speaker emphasizes that despite experiences from past pandemics, preparedness remains inadequate. They highlight the impact of misinformation, particularly propagated through social media, and its ability to cause confusion even among informed individuals. The conversation suggests incorporating media literacy and critical thinking skills into education systems to better equip people, especially the youth, to discern and evaluate information critically. The speaker expresses admiration for healthcare professionals and touches on regional pandemic responses, notably Idaho's moderate strategy.
